dialog.stepLabel: Chixia: "Hey there, Rover! Remember Grandpa Jingzhu?..."

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Hey there, Rover! Remember Grandpa Jingzhu?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Yep, the one who said that “my-unwavering-love” thing.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: The one who said that "my-unwavering-love" thing. Ringing any bells now?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: So, I ran into him earlier, and he needs our help in snagging Echoes again. Hence, the call.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Awesome! We’ll catch you near the training grounds, then.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: That’s fine. Swing by the training grounds when you’ve got a sec.
